calendar.matters:
Other Review Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: (416) 04/08/2008
(Wightman) Clerk: Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR #12355. General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father not present; CSA = Trow. Matter is on calendar for other review hearing. Court orders matter off calendar at request of CSA = Trow.

Notice Of Motion Re: Motion To Set Aside Appearance/Stipulation
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted And Set For Review Hearing
MINI MINUTES: (416) 01/08/2008
(Wightman) Clerk: Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR #12355. General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per; CSA = Trow. Matter is on calendar for motion re: set aside stipulation/judgment filed on 04/05/77. With permission of all parties present, the Court participates in off-record discussions. The Court finds that this unique situation surrounding this case and this ruling are not precendent setting in nature. With no objections made by the parties, the motion to set aside the judgment filed on 04/05/77 is partially granted, as to child support only. The Court judicially determines arrears to be $5500.00, as of 01/01/08. The Court orders the liquidation on arrears to be paid, without prejudice, at the rate of $25.00 per month, effective 01/01/08. The work search review is ordered off calendar without prejudice. Within thirty days, father shall apply for the Compromise of Arrears Program (COAP) and provide DCSS with proof of application by the next hearing. Matter continued to 04/08/08 @ 8:30AM in Room 416 for review hearing on father's application for COAP Program, by request of CSA = Trow. Court orders father to appear at the next scheduled hearing date. Any Agency attorney is authorized to release father from next scheduled hearing date. The Findings and Orders of the Court were signed and filed in court this day, and are incorporated herein by reference.

Notice Of Motion Re: Motion To Set Aside Appearance/Stipulation
Off Calendar Aug-21-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 416
MINI MINUTES: (416) 08/21/2007
(Wightman) Clerk: Cienesha Young; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR# 12355. General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman acting as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per; CSA = Trow.
The court orders the immediate conditional release of drivers license of the father. Upon first payment of $50.00 and upon continuing payments each and every month thereafter of $50.00.
Matter is continued to 1/8/08 @ 1:30pm in dept 416

Notice Of Motion Re: To Set Aside Agreement/Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: (416) 07/10/2007
(Wightman) Clerk Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter Lewis Gillian, CSR# 12355. General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman acting as Judge Pro Tem. Mother not present; father not present, In Pro Per; CSA = Trow. Matter is on calendar for motion to set aside agreement/stipulation. Given no appearance by the father, Court orders matter off calendar without prejudice, at request of CSA = Trow.

Child Support
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 No Appearance; Order To Arrest
MINI MINUTES: 9-28-04

(416) General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman acting as Judge Pro Tem. Mother not present; Father not present; CSA=Trow present; Clerk: Frances Yokota; Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR #12355. The Father having failed to appear, Court orders a bench warrant cash bail $3,000.00 with restricted return to Friday AM. (Wightman)

Child Support
Off Calendar May-07-2004 Continued To Sep-28-04 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 416
MINI MINUTES: 5-7-04

(416) General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman acting as Judge Pro Tem. Mother not present; Father present In Pro Per; CSA=Saporito present; Clerk: Frances Yokota; Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR #12355; matter added to calendar; Father surrendered to the Court on a bench warrant; Court recalls bench warrant ordered on 4-27-04; driver's license release shall be considered at next hearing; work search order shall be reinstated; Matter continued to 9-28-04 @ 8:30 am in Room #416 for work search review; Father is ordered to appear. (Wightman)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO SEEK EMPLOYMENT SEEK WORK
Off Calendar Apr-27-2004 No Appearance; Order To Arrest
MINI MINUTES: 04-27-04
(416) Clerk: Louise R. Noriega; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR # 12355.
General Advisement that Comm. Rebecca Wightman may hear matter this date as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father not present; CSA = Kego Egbuono present with F. Itaya.
Court orders Warrant of Attachment (Bench Warrant) issued from hearing this date with cash only bail of $1,500.00 and restricted return to any Friday morning @ 9:00 AM. (WIGHTMAN)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO SEEK EMPLOYMENT SEEK WORK
Off Calendar Oct-07-2003 Continued To Apr-27-04 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 416
MINI MINUTES: 10-07-03
(416) Clerk: Louise R. Noriega; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR# 12355
General advisement given re Commissioner Rebecca Wightman acting as Judge Pro Tem.
Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per; CSA = Trow.
Father's driver's license to be released after his first payment on arrears of a minimum of $50.00 with Father thereafter making minimum monthly payments of $125.00 which will be applied per agency regulations. Continued to April 27, 2003 @ 8:30 am for further hearing.
Father ordered to return to court on continuance date. (WIGHTMAN)
